block.header: =N(" pudi para no pidari no opo mapye tu kimi ni noritamapu opo mikoto wo noritamapu ")

=N(" opo mikoto ni imase nori tamapa ku opo mapye tu kimi asu pa mawi de ki tukape mu to mata pi tamapu apida ni yasu marite mawi de masu koto pa na ku site sumyera ga mikadwo wo okite makari imasu to kikosi myesite omopo saku oyodure kamo tapa koto wo kamo ipu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@大臣明日者参出来仕牟止待比賜,*
IP-MAT,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,7@罷退止聞看而於母富佐久於与豆礼加母多波許止乎加母云,*

block.header: =N(" makoto ni si araba tukape maturi si opo maturi goto no tukasa no maturi goto woba tare ni yosa si kamo makari imasu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@3,PP,NP,1@太政官之政乎波誰任之加母罷伊麻湏,*

block.header: =N(" tare ni saduke kamo makari imasu ")

=N(" wa ga opo mapye tu kimi tare ni kamo wa ga katara pi sake mu tare ni kamo wa ga two pi sake mu to kuyasi mi atarasi mi ita mi kanasi mi opo mi ne naka si masu to noritamapu opo mikoto wo noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,1@誰尔加母我語比佐気牟,*

block.header: =N(" kyepu ywori pa opo mapye tu kimi no mawosi si maturi goto pa kikosi myesa zu ya nara mu ")
=N(" asu ywori pa opo mapye tu kimi no tukape maturi si sugata pa misonapasa zu ya nara mu ")
=N(" pi tukwi kasanari yuku manima ni kanasi ki koto nomwi si iyoyo okoru be ki kamo ")
=N(" tosi tumori yuku manima ni sabusi ki koto nomwi si iyoyo masaru be ki kamo ")
=N(" wa ga opo mapye tu kimi paru aki no urupasi ki iro woba tare to tomo ni kamo misonapasi mote aswobi tamapa mu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,1@色乎波誰倶加母見行弄賜牟,*

block.header: =N(" yama kapa no kiywo ki tokoro ba tare to tomo ni kamo misonapasi akarape tamapa mu to nageki tama pi urepe tama pi opo masi masu to noritamapu opo mikoto wo noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,0@山川浄所者孰倶加母見行阿加良閉賜牟止歎賜比憂賜比,*

block.header: =N(" mimasi opo mapye tu kimi no yorodu no maturi goto pusane motite okotari yurupu koto na ku mage katabukuru koto na ku opo kimi tati omi tati wo mo kare kore waku kokoro na ku amane ku tapirake ku mawosa pi opo mi takara no upe wo mo piro ku atu ku utukusibwite mawosapi si koto ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP,0@美麻之大臣乃万政惣以,*
IP-MAT,NP,IP-REL,5@公民之上乎母広厚慈而奏,*

block.header: =N(" kore nomwi ni ara zu sumyera ga mikadwo wo simar aku no ma mo makari idete yasu mopu koto na ku wosu kuni no maturi goto no nagusi ku aru be ki sama ame no sita no opo mi takara no yasu maru be ki koto wo asa yupu yworu piru to ipa zu omopi pakari mawosi tama pi tukape matureba iswosi mi akirake mi odapisi mi tanomosi mi omo po situtu opo masi masu apida ni tatimati ni wa ga mikadwo wo sakarite makari topora si nureba ipa mu sube mo na ku se mu sube mo sira ni kuyasi bwi tama pi wabwi tama pi opo masi masu to noritamapu opo mikoto wo noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@天皇朝乎暫之間母罷出而休息安母布,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,NP,4@状天下公民之息安麻流倍伎,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,NP;@2,5@事乎旦夕夜日不云思議奏比仕奉者欸美明美意大比之美多能母志美思保之ツツ,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,8@忽朕朝乎離而罷止富良之奴礼婆,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,12@湏倍母不知尔悔備賜比和備賜比,*

block.header: =N(" mata koto wakite nori tamapa ku tukape maturi si koto piro mi atu mi mimasi opo mapye tu kimi no ipye no uti no kwo domo wo mo papuri tamapa zu usinapi tamapa zu utukusibwi tama pa mu okosi tama pa mu tadune tama pa mu kapyeri mi tama pa mu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,2@事広美厚美弥麻之大臣之家内子等乎母波布理不賜失不賜慈賜波牟起賜波牟温賜波牟省賜波牟,*

block.header: =N(" mimasi opo mapye tu kimi no makari di mo usiro karo ku kokoro mo odapi ni omopite tapirake ku saki ku makari topora su be si to noritamapu opo mikoto wo noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,0@美麻之大臣乃罷道母宇之呂軽久心母意太比尔念而平久幸久,*
